summary: Comprehensive testing of Profile Visibility feature and Dashboard 3-Click Rule navigation updates. All backend APIs (15/15 tests passed) and frontend UI features verified working correctly.

issues: Minor: Music frequency shows 'undefinedHz' when no music is selected (cosmetic only)

seed_data_creation: Mutual follows created between testlearn@test.com and viewer@test.com for friendship testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile Visibility feature fully tested. Visibility options (public/private/friends) work correctly. Restricted profile view shows locked message for private/friends-only profiles. Mutual follows determine friendship for friends-only visibility. Dashboard quick actions include Mantras, Ho'oponopono, and Journey. Navigation More dropdown includes Learn link.

profile_visibility_backend.get_profile_me: GET /api/profile/me returns visibility field defaulting to 'public'
profile_visibility_backend.public_profile_full_access: GET /api/profile/public/{user_id} returns full profile for public visibility
profile_visibility_backend.private_profile_restricted: GET /api/profile/public/{user_id} returns restricted=true for private profiles when viewed by non-owner
profile_visibility_backend.owner_views_own_private: GET /api/profile/public/{user_id} returns full profile when owner views their own private profile
profile_visibility_backend.friends_only_restricted_non_friend: GET /api/profile/public/{user_id} returns restricted=true for friends-only profiles when viewer is not a mutual follower
profile_visibility_backend.friends_only_visible_mutual_followers: GET /api/profile/public/{user_id} returns full profile for friends-only when viewer is a mutual follower
profile_visibility_backend.auth_required: Profile endpoints require authentication (401 without auth)

profile_visibility_frontend.visibility_options: Profile edit page shows Public/Friends Only/Private visibility options with icons and descriptions
profile_visibility_frontend.restricted_profile_view: Restricted profile view shows locked message 'This profile is private.' instead of full content
profile_visibility_frontend.visibility_badge: Visibility badge shows on own profile when set to private or friends (shows 'Private' or 'Friends' badge next to name)

dashboard_navigation.mantras_quick_action: Dashboard quick actions include Mantras link with Music icon
dashboard_navigation.hooponopono_quick_action: Dashboard quick actions include Ho'oponopono link with HeartHandshake icon
dashboard_navigation.journey_quick_action: Dashboard quick actions include Journey link with Map icon
dashboard_navigation.learn_in_more_dropdown: Navigation 'More' dropdown includes Learn link with GraduationCap icon

backend_apis_tested: GET /api/profile/me - 200 with auth (returns visibility field), 401 without auth
GET /api/profile/public/{user_id} - 200 with full profile for public visibility
GET /api/profile/public/{user_id} - 200 with restricted=true for private profiles (non-owner)
GET /api/profile/public/{user_id} - 200 with full profile for owner viewing own private profile
GET /api/profile/public/{user_id} - 200 with full profile for friends-only (mutual followers)
GET /api/community/me/following - 200 returns list of followed users
frontend_ui_tested: Dashboard quick actions grid contains Mantras, Ho'oponopono, Journey buttons
Navigation More dropdown contains Learn link
Profile edit panel shows Profile Visibility section with 3 options
Visibility options show correct icons (Globe=Public, Users=Friends, Lock=Private)
Selecting Private visibility and saving shows 'Private' badge on profile
Viewing private profile as different user shows restricted view with lock icon and message
